content: Initial kernel provisioning (bootstrap=true). Establishes the Inviolable Kernel TCB manifest: actor model (§1), laws-to-enforcement map (L0.1), TCB adapter manifests for EventStore/DataHandle/SandboxExecutor (§10.1), corroboration discipline (L1.8), and External Witness pool manifest (§6, Appendix A). Signed by Claude + User-of-record + 3 Witnesses (2-of-3 quorum met).
